mapper.select: SELECT id, interface_id, schedule_name, cron_expr, is_active, last_run_at, last_run_status, next_run_at, created_at, updated_at FROM eai_schedule WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, interface_id, schedule_name, cron_expr, is_active, last_run_at, last_run_status, next_run_at, created_at, updated_at FROM eai_schedule WHERE interface_id = #{interfaceId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO eai_schedule (interface_id, schedule_name, cron_expr, is_active, next_run_at) VALUES (#{interfaceId}, #{scheduleName}, #{cronExpr}, #{isActive}, #{nextRunAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE eai_schedule SET last_run_at = #{lastRunAt}, last_run_status = #{lastRunStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
